title: Player Collars
description: A badly made mod that adds collars
body:
Mod icon made by: https://ewanhowell.com/plugins/minecraft-title-generator/ 

Depending on if it does well again, ill update the mod to be the same version as every other mod ive made recently

Adds in Collars for players, You can equip them using Right click. This mod is purely cosmetic and if you want them to do something you can use the mod [Transmog](https://modrinth.com/mod/transmog) and use it on your armor, Theres a small variety of ones you can use at the moment but i might make more if i get better at blockbench.

If you are wondering why its on 2.4.1 instead of 1.0 that is cause it was originaly on curseforge but I completly switched to modrith, Some mods i have to upload again but they won't be on older versions since i didn't archive them or keep them anywhere (better off not keeping them though since they are worse)
